node.name: Node.js (LTS)
install: su - dartfx -c 'export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.40.3/install.sh | bash; source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm install --lts; nvm alias default lts/*; npm install -g pnpm'

commands: su - dartfx -c 'export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; node --version && pnpm --version'
psql --version && echo 'SELECT postgis_version();' | psql -Atq postgres || true

duckdb.name: DuckDB CLI
install: arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture); case "$arch" in amd64) duck_arch="linux-amd64" ;; arm64) duck_arch="linux-arm64" ;; *) exit 1 ;; esac; version=$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/duckdb/duckdb/releases/latest | jq -r '.tag_name'); curl -fsSL "https://github.com/duckdb/duckdb/releases/download/${version}/duckdb_cli-${duck_arch}.zip" -o /tmp/duckdb.zip; unzip /tmp/duckdb.zip -d /usr/local/bin; chmod +x /usr/local/bin/duckdb; rm -f /tmp/duckdb.zip

qsv.name: QSV
install: arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture); if [[ "$arch" == "amd64" ]]; then wget -O - https://dathere.github.io/qsv-deb-releases/qsv-deb.gpg | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/qsv-deb.gpg; echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/qsv-deb.gpg] https://dathere.github.io/qsv-deb-releases ./" >/etc/apt/sources.list.d/qsv.list; apt-get update; apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends qsv; elif [[ "$arch" == "arm64" ]]; then version=$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/dathere/qsv/releases/latest | jq -r '.tag_name'); curl -fsSL "https://github.com/dathere/qsv/releases/download/${version}/qsv-${version}-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.zip" -o /tmp/qsv.zip; unzip /tmp/qsv.zip -d /tmp/qsv; install -m 0755 /tmp/qsv/qsv /usr/local/bin/qsv; rm -rf /tmp/qsv /tmp/qsv.zip; fi

readstat.name: ReadStat
install: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/WizardMac/ReadStat.git /tmp/ReadStat; cd /tmp/ReadStat; mkdir -p m4; ./autogen.sh; ./configure; make -j$(nproc); make install; ldconfig; rm -rf /tmp/ReadStat

qlever.name: QLever (SPARQL Engine)
install: arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture); if [[ "$arch" == "amd64" ]]; then wget -qO - https://packages.qlever.dev/pub.asc | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/qlever.gpg; codename=$(. /etc/os-release && echo "${UBUNTU_CODENAME:-$VERSION_CODENAME}"); echo "deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/qlever.gpg] https://packages.qlever.dev/ ${codename} main" >/etc/apt/sources.list.d/qlever.list; apt-get update; apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends qlever; else python3 -m venv /opt/qlever/venv; /opt/qlever/venv/bin/pip install --no-cache-dir qlever; ln -sf /opt/qlever/venv/bin/qlever /usr/local/bin/qlever; fi

oxygraph.name: Oxygraph
install: arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture); case "$arch" in amd64) oxy_asset_arch="x86_64_linux_gnu" ;; arm64) oxy_asset_arch="aarch64_linux_gnu" ;; *) exit 1 ;; esac; version=$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/oxigraph/oxigraph/releases/latest | jq -r '.tag_name'); asset="oxigraph_${version}_${oxy_asset_arch}"; url="https://github.com/oxigraph/oxigraph/releases/download/${version}/${asset}"; mkdir -p /opt/oxygraph; curl -fsSL "${url}" -o /opt/oxygraph/oxigraph; chmod +x /opt/oxygraph/oxigraph; ln -sf /opt/oxygraph/oxigraph /usr/local/bin/oxigraph

nginx-proxy.name: Nginx Proxy Manager
install: echo 'Nginx Proxy Manager placeholder - installation requires full stack configuration'

claude.name: Claude Code CLI
install: su - dartfx -c 'export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code'

gemini.name: Gemini CLI
install: su - dartfx -c 'export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; npm install -g @google/gemini-cli; mkdir -p "$HOME/.gemini"'

ollama.name: Ollama + ollama-code
install: su - dartfx -c 'export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; npm install -g @tcsenpai/ollama-code'
